message:
feat(trace): add event structure and HDA complex for causal analysis

- event_structure.rs (178 lines): Implements event structures as a
  formal model for concurrent computation. Provides Event and EventId
  types, EventStructure for managing causality and conflict relations,
  and HdaCell/HdaComplex for higher-dimensional automata cells that
  capture concurrent event execution geometry.

- trace/mod.rs: Register event_structure module and re-export Event,
  EventId, EventStructure, HdaCell, HdaComplex.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
